summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 candidate PRs. No GitHub mutations are planned because this shard has no shared canonical, merge/fix actions are blocked, low-signal/instant close is disabled, several open PRs still need real behavior proof or maintainer/product review, and security-sensitive #75247 is quarantined for central handling.
